mapper.sql: o.id, o.user_id, o.product_id, o.equipment_unit_id, o.source_reservation_id, o.status, o.start_at, o.end_at, o.product_name, o.product_model, o.equipment_display_code, o.currency, o.pricing_version, o.pricing_rule, o.billing_days, o.daily_rate, o.rental_amount, o.deposit_amount, o.total_amount, o.rounding_mode, o.created_at
mapper.update: UPDATE order_idempotency SET status = 'COMPLETED', response_http_status = #{httpStatus}, response_code = #{responseCode}, response_body = #{responseBody}, resource_id = #{resourceId}, completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PROCESSING'

UPDATE order_idempotency SET status = 'FAILED', response_http_status = #{httpStatus}, response_code = #{responseCode}, response_body = #{responseBody}, completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PROCESSING'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rental_orders ( id, user_id, product_id, equipment_unit_id, source_reservation_id, status, start_at, end_at, product_name, product_model, equipment_display_code, currency, pricing_version, pricing_rule, billing_days, daily_rate, rental_amount, deposit_amount, total_amount, rounding_mode, price_snapshot ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{reservation.userId}, #{reservation.productId}, #{reservation.equipmentUnitId}, #{reservation.reservationId}, 'CREATED', #{reservation.startAt}, #{reservation.endAt}, #{productName}, #{productModel}, #{reservation.equipmentDisplayCode}, #{reservation.currency}, #{reservation.pricingVersion}, #{reservation.pricingRule}, #{reservation.billingDays}, #{reservation.dailyRate}, #{reservation.rentalAmount}, #{reservation.depositAmount}, #{reservation.totalAmount}, #{reservation.roundingMode}, #{reservation.priceSnapshot} )
INSERT INTO order_status_history (id, order_id, from_status, to_status, reason) VALUES (#{id}, #{orderId}, NULL, 'CREATED', 'ORDER_CREATED')
mapper.select: SELECT from_status, to_status, reason, created_at FROM order_status_history WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC
